subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received and attained unto the lights of the Divine Countenance. From the ocean of celestial bounty thou didst seek forgiveness, and verily He hath forgiven thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت مشاهده شد و بانوار وجه فائز گشت از بحر کرم الهی غفران طلب نمودی قد غفرک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
